description.ko: 유리를 통과하는 빛의 정밀한 굴절을 통해 스펙트럼 속에 숨겨진 색채를 드러내는 놀라운 시각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A stunning visual exploration of light passing through glass, revealing the hidden colors of the spectrum through precise refraction.

prompt: A high-precision optical glass prism placed on a minimalist white surface, a single beam of pure white light striking the facet, exploding into a vibrant, detailed rainbow spectrum. Intricate caustic light patterns on the background, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, soft bokeh.
